title: Install LinkedIn Insight Tag and Meta Pixel with conversion tracking

requirements.text: Install LinkedIn Insight Tag in the frontend HTML with partner ID placeholder, ensuring proper initialization script and noscript fallback pixel
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn Insight Tag script is added to frontend/index.html with partner ID placeholder format _linkedin_partner_id = "XXXXXXX"
Script includes proper initialization code and noscript fallback img pixel
Content Security Policy in frontend/public/_headers is updated to allow LinkedIn domains (px.ads.linkedin.com, www.linkedin.com)

requirements.text: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Advisory Application submission with conversion ID placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on successful advisory application submission in SecurityAdvisory.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID format window.lintrk('track', { conversion_id: XXXXXXX })
Tracking only fires after successful form submission, not on page load

requirements.text: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Strategy Call Click with conversion ID placeholder

quotes: Conversion tracking on: Strategy Call Click

acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires when strategy call CTA buttons are clicked in Header.tsx and Home.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID
Tracking fires before navigation to Calendly link

requirements.text: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Toolkit Purchase with conversion ID placeholder and order value
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on PaymentSuccess.tsx page load
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID and order value if available from URL parameters
Tracking fires only once per successful payment

requirements.text: Implement LinkedIn conversion tracking for Checklist Download with conversion ID placeholder
acceptanceCriteria: LinkedIn conversion tracking pixel fires on successful checklist download submission in FreeChecklist.tsx
Conversion event includes placeholder conversion ID
Tracking only fires after successful lead capture, not on page load

requirements.text: Install Meta Pixel in the frontend HTML with pixel ID placeholder for future ad tracking
acceptanceCriteria: Meta Pixel base code is added to frontend/index.html with pixel ID placeholder format fbq('init', 'XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX')
Script includes proper initialization with fbq('track', 'PageView')
Content Security Policy in frontend/public/_headers is updated to allow Meta domains (connect.facebook.net, www.facebook.com)
Noscript fallback img pixel is included

requirements.text: Create setup documentation file explaining how to configure LinkedIn Insight Tag partner ID, conversion IDs, and Meta Pixel ID with step-by-step instructions
acceptanceCriteria: Documentation file TRACKING_SETUP.md is created in frontend directory
Instructions include where to find LinkedIn partner ID and conversion IDs in LinkedIn Campaign Manager
Instructions include where to find Meta Pixel ID in Meta Events Manager
Documentation lists all placeholder values that need replacement and their locations in the codebase

constraints: Do not modify backend/main.mo or any backend files
Do not edit frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts or frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts
Preserve existing Google Analytics integration in frontend/index.html
Use placeholder values for LinkedIn partner ID, conversion IDs, and Meta Pixel ID
All tracking scripts must respect existing Content Security Policy structure
nonGoals: Actual LinkedIn or Meta account setup
Real partner IDs or pixel IDs
